EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
LIBYA.
DNC 09.
VESSEL, 100 PERSONS ON BOARD, SINKING IN
33-40N 013-56E. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO
KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS
TO MRCC ROME, INMARSAT-C: 424744220,
PHONE: 3906 5908 4527, 3906 5908 4409,
FAX: 390 6592 2737, 3906 5908 4793,
